Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Я хотіла купити щось, що можна використовувати при приготуванні як секретний інгредієнт.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Але я не змогла вирішити й не була впевненою, як мені застосувати те, що куплю...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}...Слушна думка. Мені здавалося, що я повинна щось додати, але, можливо, насправді це не так.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Я ще навіть основ не освоїла. Я надто поспішаю.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 1 25 25}Перше, що мені потрібно зробити, — це знайти рецепт, який я дійсно зможу приготувати.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Мені все ще важко все зробити як слід.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 1 25 25}Але ще рано здаватись. Особливо після твоєї підтримки, {f 4 1}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Та й це не те, що в мене є якісь інші достоїнства.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_006_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Ти взагалі ні в чому не вправна?

Dialog.name: MSG_007_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Ну, гадаю, я трохи розбираюсь у техніці.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Але це більше як хобі для мене. Це не те, чим варто хизуватись.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}У всіх інших теж є щось, у чому вони справді добре розбираються.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Гадаю, я трохи розбираюсь у техніці, але це, власне, і все.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Це не те, чим варто пишатись.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Ну, всі в нашій групі старанно працюють.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}And beyond that, I think you all have something that you're good at.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}I mean, I guess I'm sort of good with machines, but that's it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}I-It's honestly not worth mentioning. Really![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 0 25 25}I just happen to like them. It's not exactly something worth boasting about.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}When I was little, I remember my dad's hobby was to work on complicated sound equipment.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}He'd fix things like broken amplifiers, or headphones that only played sound on one side.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}I've always loved watching him work on those things.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}That's probably why I was drawn to working with machines in the first place.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}But, I don't think that would be very useful to repay everyone's kindness.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}Plus, if we do ever have any technical needs, like when we're fighting, then we've always got the Kirijo Group's support.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}Not to mention that I'm kind of embarrassed about it all. I mean, it's not a very feminine hobby.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}Huh. I don't know. Maybe because it was originally my dad's hobby?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}I sure seem to talk about my problems a lot, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}I wonder why it's so easy talking to you, {f 4 1}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}I feel like you stop me from being so negative all the time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}Actually, I might owe a lot to you in that sense.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I think Fuuka trusts me now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Здається, ми стали ближчими...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}Oh, it's getting late. Sorry, I didn't mean to talk so much.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Fuuka and I went back[n]to the dorm together...[n]{f 1 1}
